[HIRING] React Native Developer (Junior devs welcome / low budget)

Looking for a React Native developer. Junior devs welcome, but you must have at least one app live in the App Store or Google Play (personal projects count). The app : Kilova is a very simple app concept, it syncs a woman's menstrual cycle phases into her calendar for lifestyle planning.
